channel.title: The Macro Brief
channel.description: Independent economic analysis for the informed investor. Weekly macro coverage, Fed tracking, and indicator deep-dives by Connor Leary.

item.title: The Price of Energy: Inside the Oil Market Forces Threatening to Reignite Inflation
item.description: A confluence of supply restraint, geopolitical friction, and fragile demand has crude oil back at the center of the macroeconomic debate — complicating an already delicate moment for the Federal Reserve and American households alike.
item.author: cleary0720@gmail.com (Connor Leary)
